name: Martian Invaders
short_description: WE HAVE ALIENS, YOU DON'T—Blast Martian invaders and flying saucers across 30 stages with robotic voice effects. Use your destructible shield, rescue army men for bonus points, and chase the high score.
detailed_description:
WE HAVE ALIENS, YOU DON'T!

Jump into a retro-styled space shooter built as a modern throwback to the 1980s.

Earth is under attack, and it’s up to you to hold the line against waves of Martian invaders and flying saucers. Start each run with a defensive shield—then keep firing as the action escalates through 30 stages, complete with robotic voice effects that sell the arcade vibe. The shield won’t last forever, so position smart, blast fast, and stay alive as the sky fills up. Save the army men for bonus points, rack up your score, and see if you’ve got what it takes to top the leaderboard.

Features

  • A modern version of an ’80s space shooter

  • 30 stages with robotic voice effects

  • Waves of Martian invaders and flying saucers

  • Destructible defensive shield for clutch protection

  • Bonus points for every army man you save

  • Arcade high score chasing

  • Classic, pick-up-and-play arcade pacing

  • Gamepad support

Go back to the 1980s and blast these Martians back into outer space!
